  -i PATTERN, --include=PATTERN    Required. Include files from glob pattern. To
                                   pass multiple patterns, separate them with
                                   space.

  -e PATTERN, --exclude=PATTERN    Exclude files from glob pattern. Has higher
                                   precedence than includes. To pass multiple
                                   patterns, separate them with space.

  -d PATH, --directory=PATH        The base directory used for globbing. Uses
                                   current directory if not specified.

  -o FILE, --output=FILE           (Group: output) The output file path. Use `-`
                                   to write the resulting Protobuf file to

                                   discouraged.
